entries.description: Rohu fish pronounced "rou" in Bishnupriya Manipuri
Katla fish pronounced "bau" in Bishnupriya Manipuri. Similar to 'bahu' expressed by other local groups.
Hilsa fish pronounced "ilisha" in Bishnupriya Manipuri
The wallago fish pronounced "bowal" in Bishnupriya Manipuri
The Chital fish pronounced "chitol" in Bishnupriya Manipuri
